description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a matte yellow exterior. The front features a large, playful cartoon face with wide, black eyes, red cheeks, and an open, smiling mouth, reminiscent of a popular animated character. The can has a smooth cylindrical body with a slightly tapered top and bottom, capped by a metallic gray pull-tab lid. The back and sides of the can are plain yellow, with no visible text or branding. The surface appears clean and free of condensation, with a uniform color and a glossy finish. The can is lightweight and designed to be easily held and opened by hand.
description: A yellow aluminum beer can with a cartoon face and a metallic pull-tab lid, featuring a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cartoon face with black eyes, red cheeks, and an open mouth on a yellow background.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals part of the cartoon face, specifically one eye and one red cheek, with the rest of the can plain yellow.
description_view_2: The back view displays a plain yellow surface with no graphics or text, only the metallic lid visible at the top.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the other eye and red cheek of the cartoon face, with the rest of the can remaining plain yellow.
attribute_graphic_design: The can features a large, cheerful cartoon face with black eyes, red cheeks, and an open mouth on a solid yellow background. The design is simple, playful, and visually striking, with no text or additional graphics.
